source: Remediation sequence C1-C6 (fresh-eyes audit 2026-06-06); filed for later manual implementation. See docs/PROJECT_MAP.md and the approved plan.
title: Make doc drift impossible: gate ABOUT.md against ground truth (C4)
what_failed: ABOUT.md drifts from reality (claimed 91 closed/61 solutions vs actual 150/99; marks coherence and autonomy '✅' when one was mid-fix and the other has never run). Self-aware (T-153) but unfixed; misleads readers and future AI sessions.
where_failed: ABOUT.md (hand-maintained counts/status); no enforcement in verify.py.
why_likely: Hand-written doc; only PI.md auto-sections are regenerated.
migration_plan: 1. Preferred: put counts/status behind BEGIN/END AUTO markers in ABOUT.md and have refresh_pi.py regenerate them from tickets/closed + SOLUTIONS.jsonl (reuse the PI.md mechanism).
2. Or: a verify.py check that FAILs when ABOUT.md counts diverge from ground truth beyond a small tolerance.
3. Capability '✅' claims must map to a behavioral test or be marked ◐ (ties to T-166).
implementation_notes: Smart and simple: reuse refresh_pi.py's marker mechanism; do not build a new doc system. Make drift impossible, not ticketed.
analysis: C4: portfolio + product both die on dishonest docs. Cheap, high-credibility. Effectively closes T-153.
